title: An Unexpected Conversation
situationText: During a performance review, your manager points out aspects of your work that need improvement.

ideal.text: I listen carefully and try to understand what practical actions I can take.

intermediary.text: I feel uncomfortable, but I reflect on the feedback later.
intermediary.laterConsequence: Some of the suggestions can still be utilized.

impulsive.text: I interpret the feedback as a personal devaluation.
impulsive.laterConsequence: You may lose out on growth opportunities.

title: Changing Priorities
situationText: After weeks of working on a project, leadership changes the organization's priorities.

ideal.text: I try to understand the new objectives and reorganize my plan.
ideal.immediateConsequence: You regain clarity about the work.

intermediary.text: I feel frustrated, but I follow the new guidelines.
intermediary.laterConsequence: You continue to contribute to the project.

impulsive.text: I conclude that my previous work was completely useless.
impulsive.laterConsequence: It may increase your resistance to future changes.
